title: Adapting the D-3He Levitated Dipole Rocket to p-11B for an Aneutronic Power Plant with Reduced Astronaut Shielding
description: Systems-level survey of adapting the Deuterium–Helium-3 (D–³He) Levitated Dipole Rocket (LDR) architecture to the proton–boron-11 (p–¹¹B) fuel cycle, aiming at an aneutronic fusion power plant for crewed spacecraft that requires substantially less radiation shielding than neutron-producing alternatives. Readable PDF: zenodo.pdf. Source manuscript and build scripts: https://github.com/catskillsresearch/ldc_p11b_fusion_spacecraft
notes: Primary readable artifact is zenodo.pdf. Markdown source is arxiv.md in the linked GitHub repository. This work was prepared with LLM assistance; verify before scientific or policy use.
